complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.开启后，本次任务中每块板的每个元件的带符号 X/Y 偏移与旋转角度都会被记录，供: When on, every component's signed X/Y shift and rotation on every board in this task is recorded, for use by the **GRR Analysis** and **Cpk Analysis** tabs of the Data Analysis Report (see :ref:`查看检测历史（数据分析报告）`). Off by default; turn it on only for a measurement study or capability analysis — while on it keeps recording measurement data and consumes storage.
complete_user_guide/inspection/index.po.若同时选择两个 PCBA，系统启用 A/B 面检测。此时两个产品中 **至少有一: Selecting two PCBAs at once enables A/B-side mode. **At least one** of the two products must define a **Unique Marker** on its programming page to distinguish the front from the back; you may also mark only one of the two products (single-mark mode — see :doc:`../features/mark_align_pcb`). If the two Unique Markers are too similar, the system rejects the start with an error.

complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.在主页点击 **工作列表** 进入 **数据分析报告** （路由 ``/work: On the Home page, click **Worklist** to open the **Data Analysis Report** (route ``/worklist``). The page has five tabs — **Summary**, **Inspection Result**, **Component**, **GRR Analysis**, and **Cpk Analysis** — and the content area switches with the selected tab. **Summary** / **Inspection Result** / **Component** share the filter bar at the top; **GRR Analysis** and **Cpk Analysis** each have their own filter row and are not affected by the top filter bar.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**GRR 分析**：评估测量系统重复性（量具重复性与再现性），用于对同一块板重: **GRR Analysis**: assesses measurement-system repeatability (Gauge R&R) for studies that re-inspect the same board; exportable to Excel.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**Cpk 分析**：评估贴装工艺相对于给定公差的过程能力（Cp / Cpk），: **Cpk Analysis**: assesses the process capability (Cp / Cpk) of the placement process against given tolerances; exportable to Excel.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**GRR 分析** 用于评估测量系统的重复性（量具重复性与再现性，Gauge: **GRR Analysis** evaluates the repeatability of the measurement system (Gauge R&R) — that is, how much the placement-offset measurements scatter when the **same board is inspected several times**. The system records each component's signed X/Y shift and rotation only when the inspection task had the **GRR / Cpk measurement study** switch enabled (see :ref:`新建检测任务`); historical inspections run without that switch have no data to analyze.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.选择 **日期范围** 与 **PCBA名称**；如需限定到单次检测会话，使用: Select a **Date Range** and **PCBA Name**; to limit the analysis to a single inspection session, use **Scope to session**. Click **Analyze**.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.左侧表格逐行列出每个（元件 × 检测）的 **X 偏移 (mm)**、**Y 偏: The table on the left lists, one row per (component × inspection), the **X Shift (mm)**, **Y Shift (mm)**, **Rotation (°)**, **Panel**, and time.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.右侧 **详情** 面板按 **指标**（X 偏移 / Y 偏移 / 旋转）给出: On the right, the **Detail** panel reports, per **Metric** (X Shift / Y Shift / Rotation), the **Sigma (σ)**, **6σ**, **%Tolerance**, and **Verdict**, with thresholds ``<10%`` good, ``10–30%`` marginal, ``>30%`` poor.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.顶部计数显示 **元件数**、**试验次数（检测次数）**、**总测量数** 与: The counts at the top show **Components**, **Trials (inspections)**, **Total measurements**, and **Included parts**; components that do not appear in every trial are excluded, with an "N excluded — not present in all trials" note.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.点击导出按钮可导出 Excel。: Click the export button to export to Excel.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.有效的 GRR 研究要求所选时间窗内 **仅包含对同一块板的重复检测**；若窗口: A valid GRR study requires the selected time window to **contain only re-inspections of a single board**; if different boards are mixed into the window, σ and %Tolerance are inflated. Use **Scope to session** to narrow it. GRR needs at least 2 inspections of the same board and at least 2 of the same components present in every inspection, otherwise the corresponding metrics show N/A.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.**Cpk 分析** 评估贴装工艺相对于给定公差的 **过程能力**（Cp /: **Cpk Analysis** evaluates the **process capability** (Cp / Cpk) of the placement process against given tolerances, also relying on the offset data recorded once the inspection task has **GRR / Cpk measurement study** enabled.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.选择 **日期范围** 与 **PCBA名称**，设置 **偏移公差** 与 *: Select a **Date Range** and **PCBA Name**, set the **Shift tol** and **Rotation tol** (which must be positive, otherwise **Analyze** and export are disabled), and pick the items to analyze by **Designator** or **Part No.**. Click **Analyze**.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.左侧 **项目 (Cpk)** 列表逐项显示其最差 Cpk 值；点击某项进入详情: The **Items (Cpk)** list on the left shows each item's worst Cpk value; click an item to drill into its details.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.中部 **计算详情** 给出该项各指标的 **上限 USL**、**下限 LSL: The **Calculation details** pane in the middle gives, per metric, the **USL**, **LSL**, **Mean μ**, **Sigma σ**, **Samples**, **Cp**, and **Cpk** for that item, plus a measurement table.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.右侧并列三张直方图（X 偏移 / Y 偏移 / 旋转），并以虚线标出 ±公差 规: On the right, three histograms (X Shift / Y Shift / Rotation) sit side by side, with dashed lines marking the ±tolerance spec limits.
complete_user_guide/inspection/data_anal.当样本数过少（少于 2 个）或测量值完全一致（σ = 0）时，Cp / Cpk: When there are too few samples (fewer than 2) or the measurements are identical (σ = 0), Cp / Cpk shows N/A.

complete_user_guide/system_management/in.本章节介绍系统级通用配置。点击右上角 **齿轮图标** 进入 **设置**，左侧: This chapter covers system-level configuration. Click the **gear icon** at the top right to open **Settings**. The left navigation is split into: **Team** (Admin only), **Manage Models**, **System Settings** (Language, Host, System Configuration, Global OCR Fuzzy Map, Capture Module, Model Updater, Programming Default Parameters, Error Type Translation, Tags, Calibration, About, Log), and **Log Out**.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.进入路径：右上角齿轮 → **设置** → **系统设置** → **全局 OC: Open: gear icon → **Settings → System Settings → Global OCR Fuzzy Map** (visible to Admin and Programmer).
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.页面标题为\"全局 OCR 模糊字符映射\"。这里维护一份全线统一的字符等价表，: The page is titled "Global OCR Fuzzy Character Map". It maintains a single line-wide table of character equivalences used by **Text (OCR)** fuzzy matching: characters in the same group are treated as interchangeable during OCR text verification (e.g. ``O`` / ``0`` / ``Q``). Each group must contain **3 or more** characters, and the table applies to all products where fuzzy matching is enabled.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.**添加分组**：新增一个等价分组。: **Add group**: add a new equivalence group.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.在分组内点击 **+ 字符** 添加成员；每个成员只能是 **单个** 大写字母: Inside a group, click **+ Character** to add a member; each member must be a **single** uppercase letter or digit (``A``–``Z`` / ``0``–``9``), and the input is automatically converted to uppercase.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.编辑完成后点击 **保存全局映射**。保存成功提示\"全局 OCR 模糊映射已保: When you are done editing, click **Save Global Map**. Success shows "Global OCR fuzzy map saved" and failure shows "Failed to save global OCR fuzzy map". Groups with fewer than 2 members are dropped automatically on save.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.过宽的分组（例如 ``8`` ↔ ``B``）会使该混淆在全线所有文本元件上都被: A broad group (e.g. ``8`` ↔ ``B``) makes that confusion acceptable on every text feature line-wide, suppressing those defects everywhere. Keep the global map conservative; for part-specific cases, use per-component learning via **Blur Mode** on the text inspection page instead (see :ref:`文本检测（Text / OCR · OCV）`).
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.修改后在 **下一次检测会话启动时生效**，无需重启后端；正在运行的会话不会立即: Changes take effect **at the start of the next inspection session**; no backend restart is needed, and a session that is already running is not updated immediately.

complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.除在模板编辑器中手动绘制颜色检测框外，**自动编程** 还可为 **CRM（片式: Besides drawing color-inspection boxes by hand in the template editor, **auto-program** can also place termination color-inspection boxes automatically for **CRM (chip components such as chip resistors)**: check **CRM Termination Color** in the auto-program configuration and the system generates one color-inspection box at each of the two terminations (solder ends) of every CRM component to verify the termination color. The size of the termination box is set by the **Termination Band Width (% of longest body side)** parameter (a percentage of the body's longest side). The termination color check is independent of **Component Body Color** and can be enabled on its own.

complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.仅在 **A/B 面双产品检测** 场景下需要。点击 :ui-btn:`+ 独特: Only needed for **A/B-side mixed-product inspection**. Click :ui-btn:`+ Unique Marker`, then box an area that is visibly different from the other side (a notch, a unique silkscreen, a one-of-a-kind component); this area becomes the product's identification feature. **At least one** of the two products needs a marker; you may also mark only one of them and let the system identify by elimination (see Single-Mark Mode below).
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.在 A/B 面（双产品）模式下，两个产品 **至少有一个** 需要 **一个**: In A/B-side mode, **at least one** of the two products needs **one** Unique Marker (at most one per product); leaving both products unmarked is rejected. If the chosen region is not distinctive enough between the two sides, starting inspection returns **HTTP 428** and prompts you to re-select the area.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.在 A/B 面（恰好两个产品）模式下，可以 **只在其中一个产品** 上定义独特: In A/B-side mode (exactly two products) you can define a Unique Marker on **only one of the products**. The system identifies by "elimination": if an incoming board matches that marker it is the marked product, otherwise it is the other (unmarked) product. This halves the marker-maintenance effort for the common two-side case.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.**图像类方法（GENERIC / OCV / TM）**：在两个产品的金板上同: **Image methods (GENERIC / OCV / TM)**: a reference image is taken from the same marked region on both products' golden boards and compared, and the better-scoring one wins; if the two scores are exactly equal, it falls back to the operator manually selecting the product.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.**OCR 方法**：识别标记区域文本并与带标记产品的期望文本比较，编辑距离 *: **OCR method**: the text in the marked region is recognized and compared with the marked product's expected text — an edit distance **below the threshold** classifies the board as that product, **at or above** as the other product; this is deterministic and needs no manual selection. The unmarked product needs no expected text.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.当独特标记的 :ui-param:`分类方法` 选择 **OCR** 时，标记编: When a Unique Marker's :ui-param:`Method` is set to **OCR**, an :ui-param:`Edit distance threshold` input appears on the marker editor (default **2**): if the edit distance between the recognized text and the expected text is below the threshold, the board is classified as this product, otherwise as the other product.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.单标记模式会把带标记产品的标记区域同时套用到 **未标记产品** 的金板上做对比: Single-mark mode also applies the marked product's marker region onto the **unmarked product's** golden board for comparison. If that region falls outside the unmarked product's image, starting inspection returns **HTTP 428**, prompting you to move the marker into an image area shared by both boards, or to re-capture both goldens at the same size.
